creator: pnmurphy@cogeco.ca
text:
I would like sylpheed-claws to be included in the mail ports due to its increased functionality over the base sylpheed port.

 See http://sylpheed-claws.sourceforge.net/

Fix: 

Clone /ports/mail/sylpheed to install http://prdownloads.sourceforge.net/sylpheed-claws/sylpheed-0.6.5claws8.tar.gz
How-To-Repeat: n/a
